Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted Against Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Hunter W. Sims III, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, City and County of San Francico, Telephone: (415) 554-4259, appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted Against Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz.

The motion is granted without prejudice to plaintiff to seek relief from deemed admissions. Defendant shall use good faith efforts to ascertain the current address of plaintiff in order to serve her this order. Subject to the foregoing, the Requests for Admissions against Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded to Defendant in the amount of $500. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

RULING - Judge Kahn discloses that the General Counsel of the University of California is a close friend of his, but neither that friendship nor any other matter causes him to be other than fair and impartial in deciding this case. Defendant The Regents of the University of California's motion for summary judgment against plaintiff Erlinda Ritz only is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Notice Of Motion And Motion To (1) Compel Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz To Provide Written Discovery Responses; And (2) Deem Requests For Admissions Set One Served Upon Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz As Admitted
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on Defendant Regents Of The University Of California's Motion To (1) Compel Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz To Provide Written Discovery Responses; And (2) Deem Requests For Admissions Set One Served Upon Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz As Admitted is adopted as follows: Defendant Regents' unopposed motion is granted. Within 14 days of service of notice of entry of this order, Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz is directed to serve code-compliant responses, without objections, to Defendant Regents' Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One) and Request for Production of Documents (Set One), served on February 21, 2017. Plaintiff Erlinda T. Ritz is deemed to have admitted each of Defendant Regents' Requests for Admissions (Set One) served on May 16, 2017. Order signed.
